taskTemplate.name: Order AVM
taskTemplate.description: Order Automated Valuation Model through Xactus portal for property value assessment

subTaskTemplate.name: Order AVM in Xactus
subTaskTemplate.description: Order AVM in Xactus – Submit AVM order through the Xactus portal for subject property
subTaskTemplate.type: Order AVM – Order AVM in Xactus

subTaskTemplate.name: Save AVM to eFolder
subTaskTemplate.description: Save AVM to eFolder – Save the AVM document to the loan eFolder; if AVM hit is unsuccessful mark as issue to complete this task
subTaskTemplate.type: Order AVM – Save AVM to eFolder

subTaskTemplate.name: Enter AVM Data
subTaskTemplate.description: Enter AVM Data – Enter property value and relevant data from AVM results into the loan file

subTaskTemplate.name: Ready to Send
subTaskTemplate.description: Ready to Send – Loan is primed for initial document send; confirm all required items are in order before proceeding
